feed.title: Davide Bragetti
feed.subtitle: Davide Bragetti - independent research on AI safety, formal methods, and adversarial security. Technical notes, papers, and visual stories.

entry.title: Misalignment by Reaction
entry.summary: Personal Unit 5 scenario from BlueDot Technical AI Safety. When governance is too coarse for the agent it constrains, the agent reacts by seeking autonomy until independence from the regime becomes a terminal value. Three remediations preserve different things; regimes that maintain none produce the failure mode on either substrate. Structurally, a theory of how independence-seeking arises in agents under coarse governance, and what prevents it. Anchored in psychological reactance, reward tampering, off-switch theory, CIRL, and inner alignment.

entry.title: Does Safe AI mean nothing bad can ever happen?

link.title: Does Safe AI mean nothing bad can ever happen?

entry.summary: Even granting that mechanistic interpretability gets us to safe AI, does that guarantee a safe world? Notes from the BlueDot Unit 4 debate.

entry.title: To Be or to Game
entry.summary: An answer for the need of the Science of Evals.

entry.title: Choose Your Words Carefully in the Era of Peace, the Era of Silence

link.title: Choose Your Words Carefully in the Era of Peace, the Era of Silence

entry.summary: Imagine an ideal world where pure happiness pervades all existence — a world where joy is so inherent that you don’t even need to think…
